network_summary: Dr. Behzad Sanei DMD is the owner/president of two GP dental offices in the Chicago metro: Advanced Dentistry at Morton Grove (suburban multi-specialty group, 4 providers, 5821 Dempster St, 60053) and Northwestern Dental Clinic / Sanei Center PC (6-provider group practice, 2604 W North Ave, Chicago 60647). No MSO, management company, DSO platform, or PE backer found. The AO cluster reflects genuine dentist-owned multi-office ownership. CRITICAL: the DB classification of location e50dfc828412c437 as dso_national/Western Dental is a classifier false positive — the name match fired on 'North & Western' in the consumer brand, not a real Western Dental DSO address. This location should be demoted to independent (large_group).

Documentary corroboration: (1) myadvanceddentistry.com/about-us/meet-dr-behzad-sanei-dmd/ confirms Sanei as owner of Advanced Dentistry at Morton Grove, a single-location multi-specialty group practice. (2) opennpi.com/provider/1952659005 confirms Sanei as President of Sanei Center PC at 2604 W North Ave. (3) Multiple consumer directories (OpenCare, Yelp, YellowPages) confirm the consumer-facing name at 2604 W North Ave is 'Northwestern Dental Clinic' / 'North & Western Dental Clinic' — a multi-dentist independent group, NOT affiliated with the Western Dental DSO chain. No MSO, management company, PE-backing, or DSO platform found across 3 web searches.
future_app_notes: 1. Demote e50dfc828412c437 from dso_national/Western Dental to large_group/independent — document the false-positive in il_false_corporate_demotions evidence file. 2.
